import json, os, re, unicodedata, pprint, pathlib, difflib, collections, itertools

qpath="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hpath="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(qpath,'r') as f:
    q=json.load(f)
len(q), list(q[0].keys())[:5]

with open(hpath,'r') as f:
    h=json.load(f)
len(h), list(h[0].keys())

def normalize(s):
    if s is None: 
        return ""
    # remove diacritics
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFD', s) if unicodedata.category(ch)!='Mn')
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي')
    # remove tatweel and punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s)
    s = s.replace('ـ',' ')
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s
target = "لا يؤمن أحدكم حتى يكون هواه تبعًا لما جئت به"
norm_target = normalize(target)
norm_target

# search in hadith texts
matches=[]
for item in h:
    text = item.get('hadithTxt') or item.get('Matn') or ''
    ntext = normalize(text)
    if norm_target in ntext:
        matches.append((item['BookID'], item['hadithID'], text[:200]))
len(matches)

# try substring tokens
tokens = norm_target.split()
cands=[]
for item in h:
    text = item.get('hadithTxt') or item.get('Matn') or ''
    ntext = normalize(text)
    overlap = sum(1 for t in tokens if t in ntext)
    if overlap>=6:
        cands.append((overlap, item))
cands_sorted=sorted(cands, key=lambda x:-x[0])
len(cands_sorted), cands_sorted[:3][0][0] if cands_sorted else None

for ov, item in cands_sorted[:10]:
    print(ov, item['hadithID'], item['BookID'])
    text = (item.get('hadithTxt') or item.get('Matn') or '')
    print(text[:250].replace('\n',' '))
    print('----')
